items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Tabygen button — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react) — the consuming project must also use Base UI, not Radix or React Aria.

items.title: Input
items.description: Tabygen input — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react).

items.description: Tabygen label — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Plain HTML element, no external primitive.

items.title: Dialog
items.description: Tabygen dialog — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react). Uses the Tabygen Button internally for its close/footer buttons.

items.title: Alert

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Tabygen tooltip — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react). Exports a TooltipProvider that must wrap the consuming app's root (see SKILL.md).

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: Tabygen radio group — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react).

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Tabygen skeleton — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors (bg-muted). Plain HTML element, no external primitive.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Tabygen accordion — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react).

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: Tabygen alert dialog — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react). Uses the Tabygen Button internally for its action/cancel buttons.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Tabygen popover — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react).

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Tabygen dropdown menu — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react).

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Tabygen progress — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react).

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Tabygen slider — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react). Thumb fill fixed from shadcn's hardcoded bg-white to bg-background so it adapts in dark mode — see TOKEN_RULEBOOK.md Section 5.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: Tabygen toggle — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react).

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: Tabygen toggle group — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react). Reuses toggleVariants from the toggle component.

items.name: sonner
items.title: Sonner (Toaster)
items.description: Tabygen toast notifications — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors via CSS variables passed to the sonner library's theme API. Requires rendering <Toaster /> once at the app root (see SKILL.md).

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Tabygen table — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Plain HTML elements, no external primitive.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Input Group
items.description: Tabygen input group — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Pulled in automatically as a dependency of Command and Combobox, but also usable standalone. Uses the Tabygen Button, Input, and Textarea internally.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: Tabygen command palette — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on cmdk. Uses the Tabygen Dialog (for CommandDialog) and Input Group internally.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Tabygen combobox — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react). Uses the Tabygen Button and Input Group internally.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Tabygen breadcrumb — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react render/merge-props).

items.name: navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation Menu
items.description: Tabygen navigation menu — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react).

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Tabygen calendar — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on react-day-picker. Uses the Tabygen Button internally for nav/day cells. Compose with Popover for a date-picker pattern (shadcn's own date-picker isn't a standalone registry item).

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Tabygen sheet — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react/dialog). Uses the Tabygen Button internally for its close button.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Tabygen pagination — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Uses the Tabygen Button internally for page links.

items.name: empty
items.title: Empty
items.description: Tabygen empty state — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Plain HTML elements, no external primitive.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Tabygen spinner — shadcn geometry. No color customization (uses currentColor via Lucide's Loader2Icon).

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: Tabygen drawer — shadcn geometry, Tabygen brand colors and font. Built on Base UI (@base-ui/react/drawer).
